EDC16p+NoxTrap - Z53 - (Diag On CAN)

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E0
Recv ID: 7E8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

Auto IDents

    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "0093",
    "version": "5300"
  }
]

[
  {
